title: Sanctuary (Abolition) Law Repealed by Act II of 2015
text:
SANCTUARY (ABOLITION) [CAP. 2. 1
CHAPTER 2
SANCTUARY (ABOLITION) LAW
To abolish sanctuary and local immunity in criminal matters.
10th April, 1828
PROCLAMATION No. VI of 1828.
Repealed by Act II of 2015.
2 [CAP. 2. SANCTUARY (ABOLITION)
